ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the county information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of absentee votes cast */,
  "reporting" INTEGER /* Percentage of precincts reporting */,
  "precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts */,
  "absentee_method" TEXT /* Method of releasing absentee vote counts */,
  "eevp" INTEGER /* Estimated exhausted votes percentage */,
  "tot_exp_vote" INTEGER /* Total expected votes */,
  "eevp_value" TEXT /* EEVP value as a string */,
  "eevp_display" TEXT /* EEVP display value */,
  "eevp_source" TEXT /* Source of EEVP data */,
  "turnout_stage" INTEGER /* Turnout stage */,
  "absentee_count_progress" TEXT /* Progress of absentee count */,
  "absentee_outstanding" INTEGER /* Outstanding absentee ballots */,
  "absentee_max_ballots" INTEGER /* Maximum number of absentee ballots */,
  "provisional_outstanding" INTEGER /* Outstanding provisional ballots */,
  "provisional_count_progress" INTEGER /* Progress of provisional count */,
  "results_warnerm" INTEGER /* Votes for Warner */,
  "results_gaded" INTEGER /* Votes for Gade */,
  "results_absentee_warnerm" INTEGER /* Absentee votes for Warner */,
  "results_absentee_gaded" INTEGER /* Absentee votes for Gade */,
  "last_updated" INTEGER /* Last updated timestamp */,
  "leader_margin_value" INTEGER /* Margin value of the leading candidate */,
  "leader_margin_display" INTEGER /* Display value of the leader margin */,
  "leader_margin_name_display" TEXT /* Name display of the leader margin */,
  "leader_party_id" TEXT /* Party ID of the leading candidate */,
  "retrieved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was retrieved */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county for the election */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  "absentee_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of absentee voting */,
  "absentee_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of absentee voting */,
  "provisional_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of provisional voting */,
  "provisional_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of provisional voting */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of early voting */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, mail) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the result */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Log of changes made to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_leader_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Party ID of the candidate */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  "candidate_position" TEXT /* Position the candidate is running for */,
  "candidate_status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* URL of the party's website */,
  "party_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "party_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "party_ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data entry, analyst) */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)
column_names: State in which the county is located
Number of registered voters in the county
Area of the county in square miles
Timestamp of the last update to the county information
Unique identifier for each election result entry
Total number of absentee votes cast

Total number of registered voters in the county for the election

Social media handles of the candidate

Status of the candidate (e.g., active, withdrawn)
Social media handles of the party
Role of the user (e.g., admin, data entry, analyst)

Timestamp of the user's last login
Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended)
List of permissions the user has
